titles.title: Jesus Shall Reign Where’er the Sun

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus shall reign where’er the sun doth his successive journeys run: His kingdom stretch from shore to Shore Till moons shall wax and wane no more

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For Him shall endless prayer be made, And princes throng to crown His head: His name sweet perfume shall rise With every morning sacrifice.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: People and realms of every tongue Dwell on His love with sweetest song, And infant voices shall proclaim Their early blessings on His Name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Blessings abound where’er He reigns; The prisoner leaps to lose his chains, The weary find eternal rest, And all the Sons of want are blest.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let every creature rise and bring Peculiar honours to our King: Angels, descend with songs again And, earth, repeat the loud Amen.
